root_cause: Restartable sidecar init container is blocking main container startup
evidence: Restartable init sidecar 'istio-proxy' is still marked started=false
Main container 'orders-api' has not started and remains waiting: PodInitializing
Recent startup-blocking events are specific to restartable init sidecar 'istio-proxy'
Startup probe failed: Get "http://10.32.1.14:15021/healthz/ready": connection refused for container istio-proxy

causes.message: Restartable init sidecar 'istio-proxy' has not reached a started state
Kubelet will not start normal containers until restartable init sidecars are started
Main container 'orders-api' is still blocked behind sidecar startup

pod:orders-api-pod: Pod is stuck before normal containers because a restartable init sidecar has not started
container:orders-api: Main container is still waiting with reason PodInitializing

likely_causes: The sidecar startupProbe is too strict or targets an endpoint that is not ready yet
The sidecar cannot finish bootstrap because its mesh, agent, or control-plane dependency is unavailable
The restartable init sidecar configuration is invalid and kubelet keeps retrying it before normal containers can start
suggested_checks: Review the initContainers entry for restartPolicy: Always and any startupProbe gating on the sidecar
Inspect service-mesh or agent bootstrap dependencies required before the sidecar can report started
